title: centaurea pinnatifida subsp. sooana
intro: Centaurea pinnatifida subsp. sooana, also known as the Soo's knapweed or Soo's centaury, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities that help protect against infections and oxidative stress. Centaurea pinnatifida subsp. sooana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory complaints.
